summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of HomePujan landing page. All critical features tested and passing.

issues: Hero fire image appears very faint/washed out at initial load due to AOS fade animation - this is intentional animation behavior, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: App.js uses window.location.replace() in useEffect — works correctly for redirect but won't preserve browser history (intentional for landing page)
AOS animations initialized with once:true — elements animate in only once per page load (expected behavior)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend landing page. All features working: redirect, hero, trust bar, service cards (all 3), WhatsApp links (correct number 919667039964), FAQ accordion (6 items, one-at-a-time), process steps, pedigree section (dark maroon bg), footer, mobile hamburger menu. No backend involved.

test_results.hero_section: PASS - headline, fire image, floating badge, both CTAs visible
test_results.service_cards: PASS - all 3 cards with image, title, pricing, Inquire button
test_results.whatsapp_links_all: PASS - all links point to wa.me/919667039964
test_results.pedigree_section: PASS - dark maroon background rgb(74,14,14) confirmed
test_results.faq_accordion: PASS - 6 questions, opens/closes, only one at a time
test_results.footer: PASS - HomePujan logo in gold, nav links, phone number, WhatsApp CTA
test_results.smooth_scroll: PASS - nav links scroll to correct sections
test_results.data_testid_attributes: PASS - all interactive elements have data-testid
